query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId, c.canLogin, IFNULL(u.role, 'sem_user') as user_role, u.consultorId as user_consultorId, u.name as user_name FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.consultorId = c.id WHERE c.role = 'gerente';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId, c.canLogin, IFNULL(u.role, 'sem_user') as user_role, u.consultorId as user_consultorId, u.name as user_name FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.consultorId = c.id WHERE c.role = 'gerente';
